free_text: On the 24Mg(t,p) reaction in the incident energy range
Level energy and spin-parity of 26Mg used in analysis
Measured by Ep=2.400 MeV resonance peak in
On the rotatable arms of scattering chamber. A
monitor detector was set at the backward angle
Not corrected for unknown background in (t,p3) and
Reproducibility of the measurement was about 5%.
Data received by e-mail from T.Murata
